selected.headline: Iran calls on young people and athletes to form human chains around power plants ahead of US bombing deadline
selected.headline_ru: Власти Ирана призвали молодежь и спортсменов выстроиться живой цепью вокруг электростанций из-за угроз американских ударов
selected.original_headline: Власти Ирана призвали молодежь и спортсменов выстроиться живой цепью вокруг электростанций из-за угроз американских ударов
selected.notes: The image of civilians forming living shields around infrastructure as a geopolitical deadline ticks down is pure Bulgakov — bureaucracy and apocalypse fused. The body becomes the last defense against strategic bombing. Machinery of power meets surreal theater.

selected.headline: Scientists engineer a single tobacco plant that produces ayahuasca, psilocybin, mescaline, 5-MeO-DMT, and ibogaine
selected.original_headline: Scientists Create Plant That Produces Ayahuasca, Shrooms, and Toad Psychedelics All At Once
selected.notes: A plant bioengineered to produce five different psychedelic compounds simultaneously. Science fiction becoming real, fringe going mainstream, and the fact itself is genuinely psychedelic. Core PsyPol.

selected.headline: Major leap toward reanimation after death as researchers preserve a mammal's brain with recoverable function
selected.original_headline: Major leap towards reanimation after death as mammal's brain preserved
selected.notes: The boundary between life and death shifting through science — Philip K. Dick territory. Consciousness research, what 'dead' means becoming an open question. Core PsyPol science.

selected.headline: Pentagon expanding Iran target list to include 'dual-use' sites, aiming to avoid war crime accusations — Politico
selected.headline_ru: Politico: Пентагон расширяет список целей в Иране, чтобы добавить в него объекты «двойного назначения» и избежать обвинений в военном преступлении
selected.original_headline: Politico: Пентагон расширяет список целей в Иране, чтобы добавить в него объекты «двойного назначения» и избежать обвинений в военном преступлении
selected.notes: The machinery of reality construction in real time — the category itself is being redesigned so that the same physical act changes legal meaning. Propaganda mid-operation, the real/fabricated boundary moving. Pelevin-grade.
selected.ai_response: The headline as written editorializes the Pentagon's intent ('to preempt war crime accusations'). Looking at the source, the Meduza article references a Politico report stating the Pentagon is expanding its target list in Iran to include dual-use sites and to avoid war crime accusations. A more accurate headline would attribute the framing and avoid implying the reclassification is solely about 'civilian targets.' I'd recommend a rewrite.

notes_history.editor: are you sure you headline is correct?
notes_history.ai: The headline as written editorializes the Pentagon's intent ('to preempt war crime accusations'). Looking at the source, the Meduza article references a Politico report stating the Pentagon is expanding its target list in Iran to include dual-use sites and to avoid war crime accusations. A more accurate headline would attribute the framing and avoid implying the reclassification is solely about 'civilian targets.' I'd recommend a rewrite.

selected.headline: Orbán compared himself to a mouse freeing a lion from a net in a phone call with Putin
selected.headline_ru: Bloomberg: Орбан в разговоре с Путиным сравнил себя с мышью, освобождающей льва из сетей
selected.original_headline: Bloomberg: Орбан в разговоре с Путиным сравнил себя с мышью, освобождающей льва из сетей
selected.notes: A sitting head of state casting himself as a mouse to Putin's lion, using an Aesop's fable as diplomatic language. Power as absurdist theater, Gogol-grade self-abasement dressed as strategy.

selected.headline: Testing suggests Google's AI Overviews generate millions of false statements per hour
selected.original_headline: Testing suggests Google's AI Overviews tell millions of lies per hour
selected.notes: Reality glitch at industrial scale — an automated system fabricating information at a rate no human institution could match, embedded in the world's dominant search engine. The real/fake boundary dissolving in real time.

selected.headline: A startup has been approved to let an AI system prescribe psychiatric medication without a human doctor
selected.original_headline: Startup Approved to Let AI System Prescribe Psychiatric Medication
selected.notes: An algorithm deciding who gets antidepressants and antipsychotics. The machine-that-constructs-reality now constructs your neurochemistry. Philip K. Dick territory — who decides what your mind should feel like?

selected.headline: A startup has been quietly pitching cloned human bodies as vessels for brain transfer
selected.original_headline: A Startup Has Been Quietly Pitching Cloned Human Bodies to Transfer Your Brain Into
selected.notes: Science fiction becoming real in the most literal way. The boundary of what 'human' means shifting. Whether vaporware or not, the fact that someone is pitching this to investors is PKD-grade.

selected.headline: Antimatter has been transported by road for the first time
selected.notes: The mundane meets the cosmic — antimatter, the stuff of annihilation physics, loaded into a vehicle and driven down a highway. Reality feeling psychedelic through hard facts. Nature/deep science core PsyPol.

selected.headline: Dozens of robotaxis in China stop dead in the middle of roads and highways, causing crashes
selected.original_headline: Dozens of Robotaxis In China Stop Dead in the Middle of Roads and Highways, Causing Crashes
selected.notes: A fleet of autonomous vehicles simultaneously freezing on public roads — the machine-control layer of reality glitching visibly. PKD reality-glitch quality.

selected.headline: Tesla workers are secretly seizing manual control of robotaxis when they get stuck
selected.original_headline: Tesla Workers Are Seizing Control of Robotaxis When They Get Stuck
selected.notes: The Wizard of Oz behind the curtain — the 'autonomous' future turns out to have humans hiding inside the machine. The machinery of reality construction (autonomous driving as marketing) exposed. Pairs perfectly with the China robotaxi freeze.

selected.headline: Border Patrol agents made challenge coins featuring Charlotte's Web characters in riot gear
selected.original_headline: Border Patrol Agents Sold Challenge Coins With ‘Charlotte’s Web’ Characters in Riot Gear
selected.notes: Federal agents minting collectible coins with children's book characters dressed for combat. The absurdity is in the facts — Gogol-grade dark comedy where state violence and childhood innocence fuse into a souvenir.

selected.headline: Chinese scientists are engineering plants with firefly genes to glow, aiming to light cities at night
selected.original_headline: Chinese Scientists Bioengineering Plants With Firefly Genes to Glow, in Effort to Light Cities at Night
selected.notes: Bioluminescent urban lighting — nature and technology merging in a way that makes the future feel genuinely psychedelic. Science fiction becoming real, core PsyPol.

selected.headline: College students losing the ability to participate in class discussions after offloading their thinking to AI
selected.original_headline: College Students Losing Ability to Participate in Class Discussions Because They Offloaded Their Thinking to AI
selected.notes: The cognitive machinery of education breaking down as students outsource thought itself. Agency and control — humans losing capacity they delegated to machines. The PKD question: what happens when you stop thinking for yourself?

selected.headline: To Lam consolidates power as Vietnam's 'supreme leader' after being elected president while already ruling as party chief
selected.original_headline: To Lam emerges as Vietnam’s ‘supreme leader’ after being elected president
selected.notes: A security-state figure accumulating all titles in a nominally collective-leadership system. Regional portrait of power consolidation — Pelevin's power-as-theater in Southeast Asian form.

selected.headline: Grandmother faces trial in Alabama for wearing a penis costume to an anti-Trump protest
selected.original_headline: Grandmother Faces Trial in Alabama for Wearing Penis Costume to No Kings Protest
selected.notes: A grandmother, a penis costume, a criminal trial, a political protest. The state prosecuting costume choices is Gogol-grade absurdist bureaucracy. Dark comedy where the legal system meets carnival.

selected.headline: Russian airline Nordwind couldn't find enough tourists to fill its Moscow-to-Pyongyang flights
selected.headline_ru: Авиакомпания Nordwind не смогла привлечь туристов на рейсы из Москвы в Пхеньян
selected.original_headline: Авиакомпания Nordwind не смогла привлечь туристов на рейсы из Москвы в Пхеньян
selected.notes: A commercial airline trying and failing to sell leisure tourism to North Korea. The absurdity is structural — someone approved a business plan for Pyongyang holidays. Gogol-grade dark comedy.
